name: superpowers-sage
description: Modern WordPress development with Sage, Acorn & Lando. Workflow skills (architecture-discovery, plan-generator, building, designing, verifying), design tool integration, content modeling, visual verification, and lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Sage + Acorn + Lando skills for AI-assisted WordPress development.
interface.longDescription: Bundle of skills, agents, slash commands, and lifecycle hooks for building modern WordPress sites on Roots Sage with Acorn (Laravel IoC) and Lando local development. Covers architecture discovery, plan generation, parallel building, ACF Composer blocks, Livewire, Eloquent, routes, middleware, queues, performance, security, design tool integration (Paper, Stitch, Figma, Pencil) and visual verification.
